results.rendered_html:
ava-√do -dyati (ind.p. -dāya,  ĀśvGṛ. ;  BhP. ) Ved. to cut off, divide (especially the sacrificial cake and other objects offered in a sacrifice),  ŚBr.  &c.;
to cut into pieces,  BhP. ;
(aor. Pot. Ā. 1. sg. -diṣīya [derived fr. ava-√dā, ‘to present’, by,  Gmn. ]; perhaps fr. ava-√day above)
to appease, satisfy with (instr.),  RV. ii, 33, 5.
